	adoption_bonus = "tr_diplomacy_adopt"
	finish_bonus = "tr_diplomacy_finish"
	traditions = {
		"tr_diplomacy_the_federation"

		"tr_diplomacy_direct_diplomacy"
		"tr_diplomacy_eminent_diplomats"
	}

	potential = {
		NOR = {
			has_valid_civic = civic_inwards_perfection
			has_valid_civic = civic_hive_devouring_swarm
			has_origin = origin_endbringers
		}
	}

	ai_weight = {
		factor = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 25
			has_federator_personality = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 10
			has_federation = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 4
			has_ethic = ethic_xenophile
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 6
			has_ethic = ethic_fanatic_xenophile
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			OR = {
				is_xenophobe = yes
				is_homicidal = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			is_gestalt = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = @ap_pending_tradition_suppress
			has_ap_pending = yes
		}
